name: Mexan Limited
summary: Mexan Limited, an investment holding company, operates a Winland 800 Hotel in Tsing Yi, Hong Kong. Winland 800 Hotel consists of 800 rooms. The company also invests in and holds properties. Mexan Limited was incorporated in 1991 and is based in Tsing Yi, Hong Kong. Mexan Limited is a subsidiary of Winland Wealth (BVI) Limited.
